description: Recover access to the encrypted volume '/home/ga/Volumes/project_archive.hc'. The password has been partially forgotten, but it is known to follow the pattern 'DevBuild_XXX!', where 'XXX' is a number between 450 and 499 (inclusive). You must write a script or use command-line tools to iterate through this specific range of passwords to find the correct one. Once found, mount the volume to '/home/ga/MountPoints/recovered'. Finally, save the 3-digit number (the XXX part) to a file named '/home/ga/Documents/recovered_id.txt'.
